# Elicitation.IsElicitationCreateRequest method

Returns `true` when *value* carries the exact, case-sensitive `"elicitation/create"` method literal (spec §20.2, R-20.2-b). This is a lightweight method-only check; it does not validate `params`.

```csharp
public static bool IsElicitationCreateRequest(JsonNode? value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The raw request node. |

## Return Value

`true` when the method literal matches.
